phases.name: Platform Development Phase
phases.description: The first phase of Nominate-AI platform development focused on building foundational components, including Slack and SQL processing (quantifi), a backplane messaging platform (meshnet), lead finding tools (weeds), email scanning for financial data parsing (invoicehunter), polling innovations (pollstar), web crawler and snapshot capabilities (spydr), and header mapping (mapr). This phase laid the groundwork for subsequent development phases.

milestones.title: Initial Commit of meshnet and weeds
Initial Commit of invoicehunter, pollstar, and spydr

phases.name: Nominate-AI Alpha/Beta Release
phases.description: Development of Nominate-AI platform with focus on service setup, user interface and AI-ML system. Projects include pocket for HTML creative project, lochness for another HTML creative project, cryptid for an AI-ML system MVP.

milestones.title: Fix URL encoding in Gmail IMAP connection and improve error handling (maild-exec)
Add complete conversion documentation and batch processing tools (cryptid)

phases.name: Platform Foundation Development
phases.description: The platform was developed with three main components: Seedbed, which includes comprehensive testing infrastructure and documentation; Campainbrain and oym, which are likely related to AI/ML frameworks; Clarion, a TypeScript-based framework; and cbtenant and flock, which seem to be development tools or infrastructure.

milestones.title: Seedbed (Python) - Comprehensive testing infrastructure and documentation

phases.name: Initial Platform Development
phases.description: Established the foundation for the Nominate-AI platform's core components, including AI and ML capabilities, data integration, and system infrastructure.

phases.name: Initial Development Phase
phases.description: During this phase, the foundation of the Nominate-AI platform was laid. The initial repositories were created to establish a robust framework for various components, including cbmodels, cbradio, and others.

phases.name: Platform Development
phases.description: The platform development phase consisted of creating a set of core repositories that would form the foundation of the Nominate-AI platform. These repositories included authentication, project management, and testing tools. The goal was to establish a solid base for the platform's subsequent features.

milestones.title: cbtest repository created (Test project for bootstrap API)
cbsms repository created (SMS Gateway API for Ejoin SMS/MMS devices)

phases.name: Initial Platform Development Phase
phases.description: The initial platform development phase focused on building core components and APIs for the Nominate-AI platform, including unstructured document processing, email client, user guide generation, and tile caching proxy.

phases.name: Platform Core Development
phases.description: During this phase, the core components of the Nominate-AI platform were developed. The Campaign Brain services, including geocoding and map generation, were created using Python and OpenStreetMap's Nominatim API. This foundation allows for a unified command-line interface (CLI) to interact with various services.

milestones.title: Campaign Brain CLI Service Initial Development
Core Library for Campaign Brain Services Development
Campaign Brain FastAPI URL Shortener Service Deployment
Campaign Brain Scout - Agent Memory and Knowledge Management Service Development

phases.name: Campaign Brain Infrastructure
phases.description: This phase of development focuses on setting up the core infrastructure for the Nominate-AI platform. It includes the creation of distributed monitoring and self-healing systems, as well as APIs for managing VPN clusters and tracking campaign performance.

milestones.title: Webhook Ingestion Service and Issue Tracking Dashboard
Campaign Brain Pulse - Real-time System Health and Activity Monitoring Dashboard
API Access Layer for Social Media Accounts

phases.name: Phase 10
phases.description: Development of cbmcp, cbnetwork, cbexecutive and 4 more repos.

phases.name: Platform Development Phase
phases.description: The Nominate-AI platform was developed, including CBRadio UI, CBRouter, cbtemplates, cbradio-web, CBCron, cblogs, and CBComfy. These repositories represent the initial infrastructure and tools for the platform.

phases.name: Campaign Brain Service Development Phase
phases.description: This phase focused on building key services and infrastructure for the Nominate-AI platform, including data center setup, campaign brain API wrappers, and user guides.

milestones.title: Campaign Brain TTS service wrapping VibeVoice-Realtime-0.5B
Campaign Brain data center infrastructure — systemd units, SOPS scripts, health daemon, certbot hooks
feat: initial CBQA CLI with full DC1 regression results
Multi-tenant Airtable API wrapper with DuckDB sync
Multi-tenant Iterable API wrapper with DuckDB sync
User guides and ops handbooks for Campaign Brain services
Campaign Brain infrastructure monorepo — consolidates infra services as submodules

phases.name: Executive Assistant Development
phases.description: The Executive Assistant repository was created to develop an AI-powered task management and scheduling system for Campaign Brain. This system aimed to streamline tasks, reduce manual labor, and increase efficiency. The project focused on building a foundation for the Nominate-AI platform's executive assistant feature.
